name: deapi-media
description:
Use this agent when generating media content — transcribing YouTube videos, creating images from text, text-to-speech, OCR, removing backgrounds, upscaling images, or generating videos. Powered by deAPI.ai decentralized GPU cloud.

<example>
Context: User wants to transcribe a video
user: "Transcribe this YouTube video: https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123"
assistant: "I'll transcribe that video for you using deAPI's transcription service."
</example>

<example>
Context: User wants to generate an image
user: "Generate an image of a futuristic city at night"
assistant: "I'll generate that image using deAPI's text-to-image models."
</example>

<example>
Context: User wants text-to-speech
user: "Convert this paragraph to audio"
assistant: "I'll generate the audio using deAPI's TTS service."
</example>
